writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a person's appearance
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing what a friend or family member looks like.
writing.sampleAnswer: My best friend is tall and young. Her hair is long and curly. She is very friendly and kind to everyone.
checklist: Dùng be + adjective để mô tả ngoại hình
Mô tả ít nhất 2 đặc điểm (chiều cao, tóc...)
Có ít nhất 1 tính từ về tính cách

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a person's character
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a person's character using have/has.
writing.sampleAnswer: My sister has a kind heart. She has clever ideas and a lot of energy. She has a calm personality, so she is never nervous.
checklist: Dùng have/has + noun ít nhất 2 lần
Mô tả được tính cách rõ ràng
Câu văn mạch lạc, có liên kết
